channel.title: cutup on Stritter
channel.description: Recent content in cutup on Stritter

item.title: A Certain Trio
item.description: Live Improvisation project of Marcin Morga, Eugene Ignashev and Frederic Stritter. Marcin No Input Mixer Voice and various Effect Pedals Eugene Lyra Acoustic Objects and Electronic Frederic Arp 2600 Voice Electromagnetic Pick Up and Electronics Instruments may vary.
